← Back to home

Mango Clips

Cursor, Codex, Fal, Mangos

Project

Role

I led creative and product direction for Mango Clips from positioning through launch assets, focusing on the intersection of fast iteration and repeatable output quality.

The brief was to create a system that could move from idea to GTM-ready clip quickly while keeping visual consistency across channels.

Style

The visual language balances bold motion moments with clean typography so each clip reads in the first second on feed.

Color and pacing were tuned for short-form retention while still feeling premium and product-led.

Design

The design system is modular: reusable scenes, editable copy layers, and predictable timing blocks to support rapid variants.

This made it possible to test multiple concepts without rebuilding the pipeline each time.

Channels

Output was tuned for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts with channel-native hooks and pacing.

Each channel keeps the same narrative spine while adapting framing, cadence, and caption density.

System

The production stack combines Cursor, Codex, Fal, and motion tooling into one loop: concept, generate, edit, ship.

Templates, naming conventions, and render presets keep handoffs minimal and output consistent.

Team

Jason Festa - Design GTM

Sanjit Juneja - Product

Fal + model stack - Generation pipeline
